tests.name: Initial recommended command visible
tests.expected: The page shows Unclear Requirements and displays maestro-brainstorm as the initial recommended command.

tests.name: Scenario choices progress active command
tests.expected: Choosing the next command progresses from maestro-brainstorm toward maestro-blueprint, maestro-analyze 1, and maestro-plan 1.

tests.name: Terminal routes are visible
tests.expected: The closing node shows Stop, Quality Pipeline, and Knowledge Capture without rendering downstream internals.

tests.name: Checklist completion count changes
tests.expected: Validation Checklist checkboxes are present and the completed count can change.
